gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/136)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/136)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ لُحُومِ الْجَوَامِيسِ وَ أَلْبَانِهَا فَقَالَ لَا بَأْسَ بِهِمَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Al Husay, from Safwan, from Abdullah Bin Jundab who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> about the Buffalo meats and their milks. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘There is no problem with these’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Muhammad ibn abu al-Hassan from Safwan from ‘Abd Allah ibn Jundab who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the meat of a buffalos and its milk. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is not unlawful to use such items for food.’”
